description: A dark interior scene dominated by deep red curtains. At right, a woman lies sleeping on a bed, her pale form visible against white sheets. At left, a dark-skinned man in ornate clothing approaches through the parted curtains, holding a candle or light. The floor is strewn with objects. The atmosphere is deeply ominous, with the warm red of the curtains contrasting with the darkness beyond. The painting captures a moment of impending violence.
